channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Rising water levels threaten homes and roads in Gatineau amid spring flooding in Quebec and Ontario
item.description: Spring flooding conditions are causing significant concern across parts of Quebec and Ontario, with Gatineau among the hardest-hit areas as water levels continue to rise along the Ottawa River. Local ...

item.title: Manchester City Defeat Arsenal 2-1 in Premier League Title Race Clash at Etihad
item.description: Naija fans, make una hear this one! Manchester City just beat Arsenal 2-1 for one very hot Premier League match wey happen for Etihad Stadium on Sunday, April 19, 2026. The game na real title decider ...

item.title: PM Shehbaz’s Diplomatic Visit Draws Attention for Both Policy Efforts and Personal Presentation
item.description: Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif recently completed a high-level four-day diplomatic tour covering Saudi Arabia, Qatar, and Turkiye from April 15 to 18. The visit was primarily focused on sensitive geopo...

item.title: Restorative justice helps former addict rebuild life after involvement in Middlesbrough riots
item.description: Stacey Vint, a 34-year-old mother of five from Middlesbrough, was captured on video pushing a burning wheelie bin towards police lines during far-right riots that followed the Southport attack in 2024...

item.title: Human Societies as a Transformative Force in the Anthropocene: Balancing Progress and Sustainability
item.description: Human societies have evolved from merely adapting to the natural world to actively reshaping it on a massive scale through cultural and social innovations. From the early controlled use of fire to mod...

item.title: Nigeria Police Redeploys CP Akin Fakorede to Head Anti-Fraud Unit at FCID Alagbon Amid Public Criticism

item.title: London Mayor Sadiq Khan Commends Pakistan PM Shehbaz Sharif for Mediating US-Iran Peace Efforts
item.description: London Mayor Sadiq Khan has appreciated Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif for showing great statesmanship in the peace talks between the United States and Iran. While speaking to Geo News during the Vaisa...

item.title: US prepares renewed talks with Iran as Trump escalates threats over civilian infrastructure
item.description: U.S. President Donald Trump said American representatives will travel to Pakistan for renewed talks aimed at ending the Iran war, while simultaneously warning that the United States could strike Irani...

item.title: Simba SC beats Namungo FC 3-1 in Mainland Tanzania Premier League
item.description: Simba SC showed strong performance as they defeated Namungo FC by 3 goals to 1 at Majaliwa Stadium in Lindi on April 19, 2026. This victory marks their 12th win in the Mainland Tanzania Premier League...

item.title: Nigeria's 2026 Electoral Act: Strengths, Gaps and Five Urgent Reforms for Better Elections
item.description: Nigeria has just passed a new Electoral Act in February 2026 that aims to fix plenty issues in how elections are run. The law sets up dedicated funding for the Independent National Electoral Commissio...

item.title: How the Secretary Bird Hunts and Stomps Venomous Snakes in Africa
item.description: The article profiles the secretary bird, a tall, terrestrial raptor native to the African savanna that specializes in hunting venomous snakes, including various cobra species. The bird uses its long, ...

item.title: Tragic Blast at Virudhunagar Firecracker Unit Claims 20 Lives, CM Stalin Orders Immediate Rescue
